data.title: [create-dso-app]: bash stub override routes on first arg only -> multi-arg calls may misdirect
data.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.
Finding: In test_installer_configures_dso_shim_after_deps, bash stub uses case on $1 to route; if bash is called with flags before the script path (e.g., bash -x script.sh), $1 would be '-x' not the script path, causing it to exec /bin/bash with -x which behaves differently.
File: tests/scripts/test-create-dso-app.sh
Category: correctness
